methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Diplomatic rupture deepens as US rejects Tehran offer and Trump likens forces to pirates seizing Iranian oil
bullets: Trump states there will be no early end to the war and expresses dissatisfaction with the Tehran offer.
Trump describes US forces as pirates actively seizing Iranian oil.
An Iran war protester addressed Al Jazeera from the top of a bridge in Washington.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor for retaliatory rhetoric or actions targeting US assets near the Iranian border.
